title: The Average Buyer Pays 3% Too Much
description: Without independent data, most buyers accept early offers or fail to challenge inflated asking prices. We don't.

title: Off-Market Eliminates Bidding Wars
description: Bidding wars cost buyers an average of 8% above guide price. Off-market deals remove the competition entirely.

title: Survey Issues Cost £12k on Average
description: Missing structural or legal problems before exchange can be catastrophic. We identify them early - and use them to renegotiate.
